metadata.description: Sign up for Trusted Care Foundation mental health training sessions.

smsConsent.heading: SMS Communication Consent
smsConsent.introBold: Trusted Care Foundation uses text messaging to send reminders and updates about trainings, events, and opportunities.
smsConsent.legalBeforeLink: Message and data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out at any time; reply HELP for help. By selecting Yes below, I agree to the SMS Terms and acknowledge the SMS Privacy Policy:
smsConsent.yesLabel: I consent to receive SMS marketing text messages.
smsConsent.noLabel: I do not consent to receiving marketing text messages.
